EM REPORTS MOST SEVERE AND EXTENSIVE WIND DAMAGE FROM AROUND GILTNER TO AURORA TO THE SOUTH AND EAST TO THE COUNTY LINE. LARGE HIGH VOLTAGE TRANSMISSION LINE IS DOWN FOR APPROXIMATELY 8 MI FROM NEAR HWY 14 TO NEAR GILTNER SPUR. 2 SEMI TRACTOR TRAILERS BLOWN OVER ON INTERSTATE 80. MANY POWER LINES DOWN AND POLES SNAPPED. MOST HAVE POWER RESTORED AS OF 10AM CST SAT. EXTENSIVE LARGE TREE LIMB (6-8 IN OR LARGER) DAMAGE. DAMAGE TO ROOFS, OUTBUILDINGS, AND GRAIN BINS BLOWN IN OR BLOWN OFF FOUNDATIONS. A FEW TREES BLOWN ONTO CARS. LARGE AREA WHERE PIVOTS AND CORN WERE BLOWN OVER.
